description_long: This is a modern commercial jet airliner with a streamlined fuselage, swept-back low-mounted wings, and prominent winglets at the wingtips. The aircraft features two large turbofan engines mounted beneath the wings, a conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer, and a tricycle landing gear configuration. The cockpit is positioned at the forward end of the fuselage, with a row of windows running along the length of the passenger cabin. The tail fin and winglets are accented in blue, contrasting with the primarily white body. The overall design emphasizes aerodynamic efficiency and passenger capacity, typical of medium to large passenger jets.
description: A sleek, white commercial jet airliner with blue-accented tail and winglets, featuring twin underwing turbofan engines and a conventional tail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, cockpit windows, and symmetrical low-mounted wings with visible engines and winglets.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the elongated fuselage, row of passenger windows, underwing engine, and blue tail fin.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin engines, horizontal stabilizers, and the single vertical stabilizer with blue accents.
description_view_3: Right side profile similar to the left, showing the opposite engine, windows, and blue tail details.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with swept-back wings and upward-canted winglets at the tips.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main units and a single nose gear
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multi-seat configuration and multiple windows
